name: ArtifactOwnershipRules
tldr: Artifact ownership is exclusive — only one spec may own a given shared artifact; reads are unrestricted.

name: SpecIdNamingRules
tldr: Spec IDs must be NNN-slug; generated by incrementing the highest existing prefix.

name: ChangelogAppendOnlyRule
tldr: changelog.md is append-only; every plan mutation and fix event writes a timestamped block.

name: SpecFilesAllowlistRule
tldr: Only spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md, and artifacts.json are permitted in a spec directory.

name: ArtifactPathPrefixRule
tldr: All owns/reads paths in artifacts.json must start with shared/.

name: TestingRules
tldr: Test file location, temp-dir pattern, and no-mock-fs rule for all specs adding tests.
